# Wall Sup scalar three-region SK rational fit
# Region 1 (eps<eps_lo):     exact AT asymptotic
# Region 2 (eps_lo<=h<=h_hi): P(u)/Q(u), u=1/(1+h/h_scale)
#   P(u)=sum(p_i*u^(p_min+i)), Q(u)=1+sum(q_i*u^(i+1))
# Region 3 (h>h_hi): C1/h^p + C2/h^(p+1)
#   Xa_corr, Ya_corr: both C1,C2 fitted (C1 ~ exact Faxen)
#   Yb, XcPlus, YcPlus: both fitted from RPY tail
# h_scale=1.0  n_num=5  n_den=4
# ff_power={'Xa_corr': 1, 'Ya_corr': 1, 'Yb': 4, 'XcPlus': 3, 'YcPlus': 3}
# cpp_limits={'Xa_corr': 0.18, 'Ya_corr': 0.01, 'Yb': 0.1275, 'XcPlus': 0.01, 'YcPlus': 0.1}
# name  p_min  C1  C2  h_lo  h_hi  p_0..p_{n_num-1}  q_0..q_{n_den-1}
Xa_corr  1  1.109634968998860e+00  1.528146328519586e+00  1.180000e+00  5.000000e+00  1.120005664933047e+00 -5.558147331558034e+00 7.688387115190495e+00 -8.113664866045236e-01 -2.480315852559996e+00 -7.135092363093396e+00 1.836104162405746e+01 -1.977757715265834e+01 7.192102367515896e+00
Ya_corr  1  5.618808968155050e-01  3.279490715092686e-01  1.010000e+00  7.033898e+00  5.763734192867774e-01 -3.489458389962487e+00 7.225820188062540e+00 -5.475357793439161e+00 7.411328114949611e-01 -7.436695370150407e+00 2.064191518319892e+01 -2.532767430642046e+01 1.158125221442235e+01
Yb  4  -1.235114661625061e-01  -8.742417745690594e-02  1.127500e+00  5.677966e+00  -1.811410106134928e-01 1.271948310931649e+00 -2.763502444759759e+00 1.351841742965125e+00 1.076721102900293e+00 -9.313382817204456e+00 3.226701916526849e+01 -4.925434978362666e+01 2.794595790897293e+01
XcPlus  3  1.665138430834157e-01  1.541662674228200e-03  1.010000e+00  5.000000e+00  1.711473121596561e-01 -8.356411418797036e-01 6.420025223047298e-01 1.950421366558023e+00 -2.522198333617357e+00 -8.049627346928901e+00 2.408005921020334e+01 -3.174097552328682e+01 1.555868064097574e+01
YcPlus  3  4.156790924402581e-01  9.838659920372691e-03  1.100000e+00  5.000000e+00  4.315086291844173e-01 -2.463668999587555e+00 3.340140539838580e+00 2.408932522110491e+00 -5.364850757901308e+00 -8.618298399082578e+00 2.755102058836714e+01 -3.876909944310184e+01 2.028105356339583e+01
